versions.version_description: Mine is at least 99% correct, the others have been rated 5 stars and it's not accurate in the choruses especially.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] 

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Hey [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch] 
Bye Bye Bye [/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
I'm doing this tonight [/tab]

You're probably gonna start a fight
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch] 
I know this can't be right hey baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch] 
come on[/tab]

I loved you endlessly 

But you weren't there for me 
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] 
So now its time to leave and make it alone[/tab]


[Pre-Hook]

[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch] 
I know that I can't take no more [/tab]

it ain't no lie
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch] 
I wana see you out that door [/tab]

baby bye bye bye


[Hook]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I'm just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch] 
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch] 
Bye Bye Bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I jut wanna tell you that I've had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch] 
might sound crazy but it ain't no lie [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch] 
Bye Bye Bye[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
Girl your more than welcome to[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch] 
so give me one good reason baby come on [/tab]

I lived for you and me

And now I've really come to see
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch] 
That life would be much better [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] 
once you're gone [/tab]


[Pre-Hook]

[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch] 
I know that I can't take no more[/tab]

It ain't no lie
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] 
I wanna see you out that door[/tab]

baby bye bye bye


[Hook]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I'm just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]Dm[/ch] 
You may hate me but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
bye Bye Bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that I've had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch] 
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
Bye Bye Bye [/tab]


[Interlude]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
I'm giving up, i know for sure[/tab]

I don't want to be the reason for your love no more

I'm checking out, I'm signing off

I don't want to be the loser and I've had enough


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna be your fool[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch] 
in this game for two [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch] 
So I'm leaving you behind[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch] 
I don't wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch] 
But I've had enough[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] 
And It Ain't no lie[/tab]


[Hook]

[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
Bye, Bye, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't wanna be a fool for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
I'm just another player in your game for two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch] 
You may hate but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
Bye Bye Bye [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't really wanna make it tough[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I just wanna tell you that i've had enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch] 
Might sound crazy but it ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch] 
Bye Bye Bye  [/tab]
